_expected_validation: fail: semantic_risk_policy.applicability_values contains 'mandatory' which is not in enum [applicable, not_applicable, uncertain]

semantic_risk_policy._comment: Every non-TRIVIAL plan MUST include all 7 categories exactly once.
semantic_risk_policy.override_rule: Any unresolved HIGH-impact semantic risk forces LARGE discipline (all three verify phases) regardless of file count.

verdict_routing._comment: Verdict emitted by controlflow-verify. Routing determines the next action.

verdicts.APPROVED: All checks pass, Phase 1 actionable, criteria measurable. Proceed to implementation.
verdicts.NEEDS_REVISION: Ambiguous Phase 1, no rollback on destructive change, unverified paths, or vague criteria. List each finding with the exact section reference; re-audit after fix.
verdicts.REJECTED: Structural flaw; scope not deliverable as authored. Explain blockers; ask the user for direction; do not start coding.
